title: Richly Roasted American Chicken Kebabs
description: A halal-friendly American dish featuring dark soy sauce and tandoor flavors, these kebabs are perfect for a show-off dinner party, with a bitter and aerated taste experience
instructions: Preheat the tandoor or oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together dark soy sauce, plain yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Place the kebabs in the tandoor or oven and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through
Brush the kebabs with a little water if they start to dry out
Remove the kebabs from the tandoor or oven and let them rest for 5 minutes
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions
